features.featureTitle: In FinalProposalSection.tsx, update the 'YES 💍' button so that clicking it opens WhatsApp with the pre-filled message 'I said YES ❤️' sent to +918810471387 using the deep link format https://wa.me/918810471387?text=I%20said%20YES%20%E2%9D%A4%EF%B8%8F. Remove the current full-screen confetti/fireworks/hearts celebration overlay and replace it entirely with this WhatsApp redirect. All other styling, animations, layout, and the 'THINK AGAIN' button behavior must remain completely unchanged.
